title: Create: Diamond & Factory
description: This Mod make Diamond from Factory
body:
**Installation Requirements**
This mod introduces an innovative way to obtain diamonds and other valuable materials in Minecraft, allowing players to automate the production of these resources using new components and devices. **Main Features** 1. **Freeze Ingot** This new ingot can be obtained from Spout, a special liquid called Freeze Liquid. Freeze Liquid can be obtained from ice blocks (Ice), which transform into liquid Freeze when processed. 2. **Powdered Freeze** This material is created by using the Crushing Wheel on Freeze Ingot. The Crushing Wheel is an existing device that helps you process resources into a finer form. 3. **Polished Freeze Quartz** This material is created when you melt Freeze Ingot in a Blast Furnace. This process results in Freeze Quartz, which you must then grind using Sand Paper to create Polished Freeze Quartz. 4. **Mixer Production** To craft the Mixer, you'll need Polished Freeze Quartz, Powdered Freeze, and Blaze Cake as fuel. Mixer Production Process Insert a combination of Polished Freeze Quartz, Powdered Freeze, and Blaze Cake into the Mixer as fuel. The mixing process will begin, and after a short time, you'll obtain valuable resources, including diamonds and other materials.
